fields.name: ADRDY_MST
fields.description: Master ADC ready This bit is a copy of the ADRDY bit in the corresponding ADC_ISR register.

fields.name: EOSMP_MST
fields.description: End of Sampling phase flag of the master ADC This bit is a copy of the EOSMP bit in the corresponding ADC_ISR register.

fields.name: EOC_MST
fields.description: End of regular conversion of the master ADC This bit is a copy of the EOC bit in the corresponding ADC_ISR register.

fields.name: EOS_MST
fields.description: End of regular sequence flag of the master ADC This bit is a copy of the EOS bit in the corresponding ADC_ISR register.

fields.name: OVR_MST
fields.description: Overrun flag of the master ADC This bit is a copy of the OVR bit in the corresponding ADC_ISR register.

fields.name: JEOC_MST
fields.description: End of injected conversion flag of the master ADC This bit is a copy of the JEOC bit in the corresponding ADC_ISR register.

fields.name: JEOS_MST
fields.description: End of injected sequence flag of the master ADC This bit is a copy of the JEOS bit in the corresponding ADC_ISR register.

fields.name: AWD_MST
fields.description: Analog watchdog flags of the master ADC This bit is a copy of the AWD1 bit in the corresponding ADC_ISR register.

fields.name: LDORDY_MST
fields.description: ADC voltage regulator ready flag of the master ADC This bit is a copy of the LDORDY bit of the corresponding ADC_ISR register.

fields.name: ADRDY_SLV
fields.description: Slave ADC ready This bit is a copy of the ADRDY bit in the corresponding ADCx+1_ISR register.

fields.name: EOSMP_SLV
fields.description: End of Sampling phase flag of the slave ADC This bit is a copy of the EOSMP2 bit in the corresponding ADCx+1_ISR register.

fields.name: EOC_SLV
fields.description: End of regular conversion of the slave ADC This bit is a copy of the EOC bit in the corresponding ADCx+1_ISR register.

fields.name: EOS_SLV
fields.description: End of regular sequence flag of the slave ADC This bit is a copy of the EOS bit in the corresponding ADCx+1_ISR register.

fields.name: OVR_SLV
fields.description: Overrun flag of the slave ADC This bit is a copy of the OVR bit in the corresponding ADCx+1_ISR register.

fields.name: JEOC_SLV
fields.description: End of injected conversion flag of the slave ADC This bit is a copy of the JEOC bit in the corresponding ADCx+1_ISR register.

fields.name: JEOS_SLV
fields.description: End of injected sequence flag of the slave ADC This bit is a copy of the JEOS bit in the corresponding ADCx+1_ISR register.

fields.name: AWD1_SLV
fields.description: Analog watchdog 1 flag of the slave ADC This bit is a copy of the AWD1 bit in the corresponding ADCx+1_ISR register.

fields.name: LDORDY_SLV
fields.description: ADC voltage regulator ready flag of the slave ADC This bit is a copy of the LDORDY bit of the corresponding ADCx+1_ISR register.

fields.name: DUAL
fields.description: Dual ADC mode selection These bits are written by software to select the operating mode. All the ADCs are independent: The configurations 00001 to 01001 correspond to the following operating modes: Dual mode, master and slave ADCs working together: All other combinations are reserved and must not be programmed Note: The software is allowed to write these bits only when the ADCs are disabled (ADCAL = 0, JADSTART = 0, ADSTART = 0, ADSTP = 0, ADDIS = 0 and ADEN = 0).

fields.name: DELAY
fields.description: Delay between the end of the master ADC sampling phase and the beginning of the slave ADC sampling phase. These bits are set and cleared by software. These bits are used in dual interleaved modes. Refer to for the value of ADC resolution versus DELAY bits values. Note: The software is allowed to write these bits only when the ADCs are disabled (ADCAL = 0, JADSTART = 0, ADSTART = 0, ADSTP = 0, ADDIS = 0 and ADEN = 0).

fields.name: DAMDF
fields.description: Dual ADC Mode Data Format This bit-field is set and cleared by software. It specifies the data format in the common data register CDR. Note: The software is allowed to write these bits only when ADSTART = 0 (which ensures that no regular conversion is ongoing).

fields.name: PRESC
fields.description: ADC prescaler These bits are set and cleared by software to select the frequency of the ADC clock. The clock is common to all ADCs. Others: Reserved, must not be used Note: The software is allowed to write this bit only when the ADCs are disabled (ADCAL = 0, JADSTART = 0, ADSTART = 0, ADSTP = 0, ADDIS = 0 and ADEN = 0).

fields.name: VREFEN
fields.description: VREFINT enable This bit is set and cleared by software to enable/disable the VREFINT buffer. Note: The software is allowed to write this bit only when the ADCs are disabled (ADCAL = 0, JADSTART = 0, ADSTART = 0, ADSTP = 0, ADDIS = 0 and ADEN = 0).

fields.name: VSENSEEN
fields.description: Temperature sensor voltage selection This bit is set and cleared by software to control the temperature sensor channel. Note: The software is allowed to write this bit only when the ADCs are disabled (ADCAL = 0, JADSTART = 0, ADSTART = 0, ADSTP = 0, ADDIS = 0 and ADEN = 0).

fields.name: VBATEN
fields.description: VBAT enable This bit is set and cleared by software to control the VBAT channel. Note: The software is allowed to write this bit only when the ADCs are disabled (ADCAL = 0, JADSTART = 0, ADSTART = 0, ADSTP = 0, ADDIS = 0 and ADEN = 0).

registers.name: CDR
registers.description: ADC common regular data register for dual mode.
registers.fieldset_description: ADC common regular data register for dual mode.

fields.name: RDATA_MST
fields.description: Regular data of the master ADC. In dual mode, these bits contain the regular data of the master ADC. Refer to . The data alignment is applied as described in offset (ADC_DR, ADC_JDRy, OFFSETy, OFFSETy_CH, OVSS, LSHIFT, USAT, SSAT)) In DAMDF[1:0] = 11 mode, bits 15:8 contains SLV_ADC_DR[7:0], bits 7:0 contains MST_ADC_DR[7:0].

fields.name: RDATA_SLV
fields.description: Regular data of the slave ADC In dual mode, these bits contain the regular data of the slave ADC. Refer to Dual ADC modes. The data alignment is applied as described in offset (ADC_DR, ADC_JDRy, OFFSETy, OFFSETy_CH, OVSS, LSHIFT, USAT, SSAT)).

registers.name: CDR2
registers.description: ADC common regular data register for 32-bit dual mode.
registers.fieldset_description: ADC common regular data register for 32-bit dual mode.

fields.name: RDATA_ALT
fields.description: Regular data of the master/slave alternated ADCs In dual mode, these bits alternatively contains the regular 32-bit data of the master and the slave ADC. Refer to . The data alignment is applied as described in (ADC_DR, ADC_JDRy, OFFSETy, OFFSETy_CH, OVSS, LSHIFT, USAT, SSAT).

variants.name: NoPack
variants.description: Without data packing, CDR/CDR2 not used

variants.name: Format32to10
variants.description: CDR formatted for 32-bit down to 10-bit resolution

variants.name: DualRJ
variants.description: Dual, combined regular simultaneous + injected simultaneous mode

variants.name: DualRA
variants.description: Dual, combined regular simultaneous + alternate trigger mode

variants.name: DualIJ
variants.description: Dual, combined interleaved mode + injected simultaneous mode
